summary: Iteration 6 full-stack testing of Vivo BI enhancements: new-styles endpoint, Footfall page, new KPIs, Yesterday preset, tornado chart reversal, understocked subcategories, low-stock-by-style, churn conditional. All 7 backend pytest cases passed. All 5 frontend flows verified visually + via data-testid probes.
critical_code_review_comments: New /api/analytics/new-styles endpoint correctly uses /top-skus (limit=10000) to bypass /sor 200-row cap when computing historical style universe — good approach. ~3s latency acceptable.
FilterBar datePresets(): this_month end clamped to yesterday, yesterday preset exposed — matches spec.
Products tornado chart renders stock on LEFT (#4b7bec blue) and sales on RIGHT (#00c853 green) as required.

Inventory: understocked-subcats shows %Sales, %Stock, Understock pts columns; low-stock-table aggregates at Style level (columns: Style, Brand, Subcategory, SKUs, Locations, Total Available) — not SKU level.
Customers page: showChurn logic correctly toggles — This Month (<90d) hides churn-box and shows churn-disabled-note; This Year (>=90d) shows churn-box (Churned: 152,490).
Footfall page: 4 KPIs, 3 charts, breakdown table all render with real data (45,030 total footfall for Apr 2026).
test_credentials: None required - read-only proxy to upstream Vivo API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 all features verified. Default preset 'this_month' ends at yesterday (currently 2026-04-18). Churn threshold is 90 days. New-styles endpoint takes ~3-4s due to historical top-skus call. All testids working: kpi-footfall, kpi-conversion, preset-yesterday, nav-footfall, ff-kpi-total/orders/conv/spv, ff-chart-footfall/conversion/spv, ff-breakdown-table, new-styles-section, new-styles-table, tornado-chart, understocked-subcats, low-stock-table, churn-box, churn-disabled-note.

backend: GET /api/analytics/new-styles returns list with all 7 required fields; Kenya filter works
frontend: Overview: kpi-footfall (45,030 vs LM +11.4%) and kpi-conversion (12.38% vs LM +1.6%) render
FilterBar: preset-yesterday present and activates correctly
Footfall page: all 4 KPIs + 3 charts + breakdown table render with real data
Products tornado: stock LEFT (blue #4b7bec), sales RIGHT (green #00c853); new-styles-section + table with 70 rows
Inventory: understocked-subcats (3 rows, correct columns) + low-stock-table at Style level (80 rows)
Customers: This Month -> churn-disabled-note visible (churn-box hidden); This Year -> churn-box visible (churn-disabled-note hidden)
